titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Harrison Flint Lewis papers, 1913-1974.
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library

titlepage.titleproper: Guide to the Harrison Flint Lewis Papers,1913-1974.
titlepage.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections Cornell University Library

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

did.head: DESCRIPTIVE SUMMARY
did.repository: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library
did.abstract: Papers include speeches; published and unpublished articles; 92 notebooks of bird sightings, 1913-1974; annotated bird photographs, 1933, 1936, and 1940; a list of Lewis' publications; and other materials concerning ornithology.

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Harrison Flint Lewis (Cornell University Ph.D. 1929), an ornithologist and writer, was in charge of the administration of migratory bird protection in Ontario and Quebec, 1920-1944; superintendent for Wildlife Protection for Canada, 1944-1947; chief, Canadian Wildlife Service, 1947-1952; and editor, "The Canadian Field-Naturalist," 1922-1925.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Papers include speeches; published and unpublished articles; 92 notebooks of bird sightings, 1913-1974; annotated bird photographs, 1933, 1936, and 1940; a list of Lewis' publications; and other materials concerning ornithology.

odd.head: NOTES
odd.p: Correspondence from Lewis is included in the Arthur A. Allen Papers, #21-18-1255.

scopecontent.p: Logbooks from May 23, 1937-August 21, 1939 and May 25, 1952-June 23, 1959 are in Box 2. Usually the summer sightings fill a notebook and the rest of the academic year's sightings fill another notebook.

did.unittitle: Articles and reprints by Harrison Flint Lewis

scopecontent.p: For the United States Department of Agriculture, Form B1-155
Facimiles of United States Department of Agriculture, Form B1-155, dates uncertain because it has been coded without the key.
Handwritten and hand-bound record of sightings by bird species over time. Information taken from notebooks in Box 1 and written out at a later time.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Harrison Flint Lewis. Papers, #3696. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
